image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_props: prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: on table, must remain visually consistent.
image_prompt_shot: shot S013. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: Protagonist A inserts the key into the lock.; The door swings open by itself.; Inside, he sees the same table and the same red mug as in his own kitchen. narration intent: Narrator explains "钥匙刚插进去，门自己开了。屋里摆着同样的桌，同样的红杯。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "这不是隔壁，这是我家。". shot positive notes: A door opening by itself, interior view of a kitchen with a table and a red mug, man standing at threshold, surprised expression, warm light, cinematic, medium shot.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: on table, must remain visually consistent. shot S013. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: Protagonist A inserts the key into the lock.; The door swings open by itself.; Inside, he sees the same table and the same red mug as in his own kitchen. narration intent: Narrator explains "钥匙刚插进去，门自己开了。屋里摆着同样的桌，同样的红杯。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "这不是隔壁，这是我家。". shot positive notes: A door opening by itself, interior view of a kitchen with a table and a red mug, man standing at threshold, surprised expression, warm light, cinematic, medium shot.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, bright, cartoonish, messy, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 钥匙刚插进去，门自己开了。屋里摆着同样的桌，同样的红杯。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
